summary.art: April 3, 2026: Seoul's art scene is heating up today with the opening of 'ART OnO' at SETEC (running through April 5). Also, the digital exhibit '20!2026 Art Seoul' continues through April 13, following a major Yoshitomo Nara auction record set yesterday.
summary.market: April 3, 2026: Unlike some international markets, South Korea does not observe Good Friday as a public holiday. The Korea Stock Exchange (KRX) is open for regular trading today.
